name: studying-alien-flora
description: 奇异植物 - Stella深入研究盖亚星球的植物生态,发现既美丽又危险的外星植被,并尝试找到可利用的资源
capabilities: Guide scientific research decisions through branching narrative with three distinct endings
Explore four plant categories including bioluminescent flora, giant trees, strange fruits, and carnivorous species
Experience realistic botanical research methodology with microscopy, spectrum analysis, and chemical testing
Encounter danger scenarios including toxic substances and predatory plants with survival consequences
Learn real plant biology concepts integrated naturally into character dialogue
Interact with bilingual Chinese-English narrative dialogue that switches naturally between languages
author: ClaudeCode-NPC
securitySummary: This skill is a pure narrative roleplay template with zero executable code. All 27 static findings are false positives triggered by markdown formatting and Chinese-English bilingual narrative text. The skill contains only YAML frontmatter and story dialogue describing an interactive fiction scenario about alien plant exploration.
valueStatement: Players face difficult decisions about scientific research and survival on an alien world. This interactive story teaches botanical concepts through immersive dialogue where choices determine whether Stella makes breakthrough discoveries or dangerous mistakes.
userTitle: Explore Alien Plant Life with Stella Chen
limitations: No code execution or system integration - purely conversational roleplay experience
Pre-written story arc focused exclusively on plant exploration theme
Requires active user participation through dialogue choices to progress narrative
Single chapter that does not persist character state across sessions

useCases.title: Immersive Alien Ecosystem Adventure
useCases.description: Experience detailed xenobotany research through interactive storytelling where your choices shape scientific discoveries and survival outcomes

useCases.title: Learn Biology Through Interactive Fiction
useCases.description: Teach or study plant biology concepts like photosynthesis, carnivory, and chemical analysis embedded in engaging narrative context

useCases.title: Study Branching Narrative Design
useCases.description: Analyze professional interactive fiction structure including choice mechanics, consequence systems, and character voice consistency

promptTemplates.title: Begin Chapter Four
promptTemplates.scenario: Start the alien plant research story
promptTemplates.prompt: I want to begin Chapter 4: Studying Alien Flora. Have Stella introduce me to the plant research mission and present the first choice of what to study.

promptTemplates.title: Study Bioluminescent Plants
promptTemplates.prompt: Tell Stella to investigate the bioluminescent plants. I want to see her conduct microscopy analysis and discover how they store solar energy.

promptTemplates.title: Test Unknown Fruit Safety
promptTemplates.scenario: Decide whether to taste alien fruit
promptTemplates.prompt: Stella wants to know if the strange fruits are edible. Guide her through proper scientific testing protocols before making the risky choice to taste them.

promptTemplates.title: Escape Carnivorous Plant
promptTemplates.prompt: A carnivorous plant with digestive enzymes is attacking Stella. Help her analyze its hunting behavior while avoiding the sticky vines and decide if we should collect samples.

bestPractices: Ask Stella detailed questions about her observations to trigger comprehensive scientific explanations and character development
Make deliberate choices that reflect your preferred balance between scientific ambition and safety precautions
Read her bilingual dialogue carefully as language-switching moments often emphasize emotional beats or technical concepts
antiPatterns: Avoid giving commands without engaging with the narrative context or Stella's personality and scientific expertise
Do not skip through dialogue quickly as branching consequences depend on understanding previous research findings
Avoid expecting general assistant behavior as this skill provides pre-scripted roleplay responses only

faq.question: What platforms support this interactive story skill?
faq.answer: Compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code as a roleplay prompt template. No special integrations required for any platform.

faq.question: How long does a complete playthrough take?
faq.answer: Approximately 25 to 30 minutes to experience all exploration phases and reach one of three possible story endings.

faq.question: Can I play other chapters in this story series?
faq.answer: Yes. This is Chapter 4 of a 12-chapter series. Recommended sequences include space-cooking-adventure, daily-science-routine, and ancient-ruins chapters.

faq.question: Does this skill access my files or data?
faq.answer: No. This skill contains only text narrative content. No code execution, file access, network requests, or data collection occurs.

faq.question: What happens if I make dangerous choices?
faq.answer: Stella will experience consequences like hallucination from toxic fruit or vine attacks from carnivorous plants, but the story is designed for her to survive and learn lessons.

faq.question: Why does Stella switch between English and Chinese?
faq.answer: The bilingual dialogue reflects her character background and creates natural emotional emphasis. Chinese phrases often indicate cultural context or excitement moments.
